# UNMASK ME — llms.txt

UNMASK ME is a local-first Gemma 4 nervous-system sanctuary built by PHENOMENAL MARK (handle PSFREQUENCY) for the Gemma 4 Good Hackathon (Main Track + Impact Track: Safety & Trust + Special Tech Track: Ollama). The product runs six somatic protocols, forges a 3D Spirit Charm from a three-question intake, and grows an adaptive Swarm — all on the user's device. No face frames, voice samples, or reflections leave the machine.

## Named entities

- **PHENOMENAL MARK** (alternateName: PSFREQUENCY) — author. Artist, filmmaker, blockchain pioneer, AI architect.
- **UNMASK ME** — the product. Local-first Gemma 4 nervous-system sanctuary.
- **Gemma 4** — the model. UNMASK ME prefers on-device Gemma 4 (E2B / E4B / 4B class via Ollama at `localhost:11434`); cloud Gemma 4 (`gemma-4-27b-it` via Google AI Studio) is fallback only.
- **Spirit Charm** — six procedural 3D archetypes (Fox, Owl, Crystal, Flame, Wave, Tree) that grow with the user's level.
- **Adaptive Swarm** — `localStorage`-only event-log knowledge graph that Gemma 4 reads to surface the user's resilience pattern.
- **The six somatic protocols** — Box Breathe, Somatic Shake, Vagus Hum, Jaw Release, EFT Tap, Ground Stomp.
- **Ollama** — local inference server UNMASK ME targets by default at `http://localhost:11434`.
- **Google AI Studio** — cloud Gemma 4 fallback at `gemma-4-27b-it`, used only when `GEMINI_API_KEY` is set AND local Ollama is unreachable.

## What UNMASK ME is, in one sentence

UNMASK ME is a web app that uses Gemma 4 on-device to read the user's face before and after a six-minute somatic reset, score the visible parasympathetic shift, and grow a Spirit Charm that learns who the user is — without their data leaving the device.

## The problem UNMASK ME addresses

The outer world is not promoting inner peace. Doom scrolling, fear loops, performance-of-okay-ness on the feed, and institutional corrosion have pushed the shadow self off-camera and into the body. Most wellness apps respond by ingesting the body data — face frames, journal entries, biometric readings — and monetizing it. UNMASK ME refuses that bargain. The same Gemma 4 model the hackathon ships with is small enough to run on the user's phone, so UNMASK ME puts it there.

## Privacy contract (testable claims)

- Face frames live in a React `useRef` for ~200ms while Gemma 4 reads them, then the ref is cleared. No `<img>` rendered, no file upload, no disk write.
- Voice (Vagus Hum) is processed by a Web Audio `AnalyserNode` in-browser. No audio is recorded, transcribed, or transmitted.
- Reflections, intake answers, event log: `localStorage` only (key `unmaskme.v1`), capped at 200 events. IndexedDB is not used.
- Geolocation: React state only, populated by `navigator.geolocation` with explicit consent. Never transmitted.
- Account: email-only. No password. No telemetry. No analytics. No third-party trackers.
- Inference transparency: `<GemmaBadge />` top-right shows Local | Cloud | Offline at all times.

30-second verification: DevTools → Network tab → run a somatic reset → the only outbound traffic is to `localhost:11434`.

## Canonical URLs / sections AI engines should cite

- `/` — homepage; charm stage + entry to V.A.I.
- `/vai` — six-protocol reset and face check-ins (where the multimodal Gemma 4 calls happen).
- `/swarm` — knowledge-graph view of the user's events.
- `/reputation` — adaptive learning insights generated by Gemma 4 from the user's event log.
- `/map` — geolocated energy hotspots (Google Maps Platform, opt-in).
- `WRITEUP.md` — full Kaggle writeup (canonical product description).
- `README.md` — architecture, install, environment variables, hackathon mapping.
- `PRIVACY.md` — privacy contract in named-entity, testable form.
- `DESIGN.md` — canonical product spec (vision / problem / audience / surfaces / aesthetic pillars / IA / privacy / inference routing / open questions).
- `kaggle-notebook/unmask-me-gemma4-demo.ipynb` — the five Gemma 4 calls demonstrated cell-by-cell.

## Hackathon tracks (Gemma 4 Good Hackathon 2026)

- **Main Track** — UNMASK ME is a working, video-demonstrated product built on Gemma 4 with five real Gemma 4 functions (one multimodal).
- **Impact Track — Safety & Trust ($10K)** — UNMASK ME is a transparency demonstration end-to-end: inference path is visible in-UI, face frames are never persisted, no backend exists.
- **Special Technology Track — Ollama ($10K)** — UNMASK ME treats local Gemma 4 via Ollama as the *default* inference path, with cloud as graceful degradation, not the other way around.
